_doc.purpose: Image-template click recipe — adapter resolves coords by matching the template on the live screen at click time.

fields.image: Path to a PNG/JPG template. Relative paths resolve against this recipe file's directory.
fields.confidence: Float in [0.0, 1.0]. 0.9 is a sane default; lower for noisy displays. Requires opencv-python.
fields.region: Optional [left, top, width, height] to restrict the search rectangle for speed.
fields.grayscale: Match in grayscale (faster, color-insensitive). Default false.
